{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aethertech cannon
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|An [[Aethertech cannon]] can be used as a follow-up to a planet-scale elemental spell.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
